subject: Polteageist, a ghost Pokemon inhabiting a decorative teapot, with spectral wispy energy pouring out of the spout and lid
description: A decorative teapot sits at the center of the image, with ghostly purple and pink spectral energy swirling out from its spout and lid. The teapot itself is ornate with a rounded body and a small circular window or eye on its side. The ghostly presence billows upward in cloud-like wisps of pale lavender and teal, giving the impression of something contained that is partially escaping. The background is light and softly colored, suggesting an interior or ambient setting with warm pastel tones.
foreground: ornate teapot with spectral ghost energy swirling out from lid and spout
emotion: playful, overflowing containment — something refuses to stay put
